title: 34 - A Parent and Teacher Talk
description: گفتگوی کوتاه یک والد با معلم درباره پیشرفت فرزندش.

sentences.text: Thank you for meeting me about my son.
sentences.translation: ممنون که درباره پسرم با من ملاقات کردید.

sentences.text: Of course. He's making good progress.
I'm glad. How is his reading?

sentences.translation: در حال بهتر شدن است. سخت تلاش می‌کند.

sentences.text: Does he do his homework on time?
Usually, yes. His effort is great.
Is there a subject he finds difficult?
sentences.translation: درسی هست که برایش سخت باشد؟

sentences.text: Maths is a bit hard for him.
How can I support him at home?
sentences.translation: چطور می‌توانم در خانه کمکش کنم؟

sentences.text: Practice with him a little each day.
sentences.translation: هر روز کمی با او تمرین کنید.

sentences.text: I will. Thank you for your help.
You should be proud of him.
